projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 12-24 months for major equipment procurement
projects.summary: Large-scale solar PV complex in planning, co-located with an existing thermal power plant. This project will require new or upgraded high-voltage grid connection infrastructure and substations, necessitating procurement of HV transformers and switchgear. Expected to move to tender within 1-2 years.

projects.projectName: Porto do Pecém Offshore Wind Project
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 24-60 months for offshore/onshore substation and HV equipment tenders
projects.summary: Proposed large-scale offshore wind project in Brazil. This will involve extensive subsea and onshore HV transmission, multiple offshore substations, and significant onshore grid connections. Procurement for these specialized and large HV components, including transformers and switchgear, will be a major undertaking in future years.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 6-12 months for grid connection and substation commissioning FAT/Inspection
projects.summary: Ongoing expansion of the Oitis wind complex across two states. As new phases are built, the grid connection and substation components, including new high-voltage transformers and switchgear, will require specialist FAT and commissioning inspection services in the near term.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 12-18 months for major equipment procurement
projects.summary: New large-scale solar PV complex in planning. This project will require new grid connection infrastructure and a dedicated substation, involving procurement of HV transformers and switchgear. Early-stage development, with tenders expected within 1-2 years.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 12-24 months for major equipment procurement
projects.summary: Proposed large-scale wind farm in the Northeast region. This project will require new high-voltage grid connection infrastructure and a dedicated substation, necessitating procurement of HV transformers and switchgear. Currently in the development approval phase.

projects.location: Pecém Industrial and Port Complex, Ceará
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 18-36 months for power conversion and grid connection packages
projects.summary: Proposed green hydrogen production project at Pecém. This project will require significant new electrical infrastructure, including high-capacity rectifiers, transformers, and switchgear for connecting to the grid and powering the electrolysers. Currently in early planning.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Next 6-12 months for grid connection and substation commissioning FAT/Inspection
projects.summary: New wind farm complex under construction. The grid connection infrastructure, including high-voltage collector substations and major step-up transformers, will require specialized FAT and commissioning inspection services as the project progresses to energization.
